headline: Insider Selling At Newmont Versus Analyst Optimism And Output Pressures
summary: Senior Newmont (NYSE:NEM) executive Mark C. Rodgers recently sold shares under a prearranged trading plan. The sale adds to an ongoing pattern of insider selling at Newmont, with no recent insider purchases reported. This insider activity comes as several major analysts issue upgrades or initiate coverage on the stock. Analyst commentary points to projected production growth alongside higher costs and an expected decline in gold output this year. Newmont is one of the largest gold producers...
